top_signals: Israel kills Ali Larijani — Iran's de facto leader and top security official — overnight strike near Tehran
Israel kills Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani in same operation
Israel launches simultaneous 'extensive strikes' on Tehran AND Beirut
Drone hits hotel inside Baghdad's Green Zone — Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq
1,000+ ships blocked at Strait of Hormuz — ~20% of global oil supply disrupted
US NCTC director Joe Kent resigns over Iran war, says it posed 'no imminent threat'
Trump scolds allies for refusing Hormuz coalition — zero military commitments from Europe
Iran fires cluster munitions at central Israel — first confirmed use on Israeli territory
Israel issues new evacuation warnings for southern Lebanon residents
Iran's power structure decimated — Khamenei killed at war start, now Larijani eliminated

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Ali Larijani — Iran's de facto leader and SNSC head
latest_news.text: Israel says it killed Ali Larijani, Iran's de facto leader and head of Supreme National Security Council, in overnight airstrike near Tehran. Also killed Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani. Removes key pragmatist voice, emboldens hardliners.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes hotel in Baghdad's Green Zone
latest_news.text: A drone hits a hotel inside Baghdad's heavily fortified Green Zone late Monday. Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: US NCTC director resigns — says Iran war posed 'no imminent threat'
latest_news.text: Director of US National Counterterrorism Centre Joe Kent resigns over Iran war, saying it posed 'no imminent threat'. Significant internal US dissent.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran and Beirut
latest_news.text: IDF announces simultaneous waves of 'extensive strikes' on both Tehran and Beirut. Targeting regime infrastructure across both capitals.

latest_news.headline: 1,000+ ships blocked at Hormuz — 20% global oil supply disrupted
latest_news.text: Over 1,000 cargo ships blocked from transiting Hormuz. ~20% of global oil supply effectively blocked. US conducting strikes on Iranian anti-ship positions.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21 15:04 UTC) — Day 18 of Iran war. Israel expands Lebanon ground ops (2 more divisions). Lebanon nearing 'tipping point'. Iran offers nuclear material dilution (diplomatic signal). Hormuz paralyzed despite US allowing Iranian tankers. Oil $100/bbl. Fujairah fire controlled. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. No ceasefire in any theater.
